title: TTRP Golden Laurels of Eldorath
description:
The Official Resource Pack to see the beautiful Golden Statues for the TTRP Golden Laurels of Eldorath.
This resource pack is for the minecraft server named TalltalesRP aka TTRP and will be updated as frequently as possible. Enjoy the Golden Statues!
body: The Official Resource Pack to see the golden Statues of The Golden Laurels of Eldorath which is for the TTRP Minecraft Server and will be an event every couple of months as a player showcase in the minecraft server. This is an optional thing to have in the Minecraft server TTRP as it is solely for the Golden Laurels of Eldorath Event chain that will happen every couple of months.
